creator: exploringlondon

transcription.text: The most incredible free immersive pop-up has just opened in London. It's a fragrance art gallery where you'll be delving into scent masterpieces. You'll get a little art collector's booklet which you stamp along the way and if you get all of your stamps you'll get an exclusive goodie bag full of fragrance minis. This is Beyond the Bottle by Space & K. Each room offers something completely different. Tler has this incredible moon installation and you can help with a communal puzzle. Deadcool will generate you a personalised poem depending on your answers to their quiz. Glossier have an immersive room where you can control the sun from sunset to sunrise. Kayali will take you back to the 90s and there's so many more. And at the end of the pop-up you have the chance to purchase any of your favourite fragrances and you'll go home with a goodie bag of minis. This is a pop-up you do not want to miss. It is incredible. Find all the details in the caption.
